canonical_filename.mechanism: SKILL.md (fixed, required filename within the skill directory)

custom_filename.mechanism: skill.mdx is accepted as an alternative to SKILL.md within the skill directory

description.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: description (recommended, not required)

disable_model_invocation.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: disable-model-invocation (optional bool, default: false)

display_name.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (optional, defaults to directory name)

user_invocable.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: user-invocable (optional bool, default: true)

providerExtensions.name: Supporting Files
providerExtensions.summary: Co-located scripts, schemas, or checklists alongside SKILL.md that the Droid can reference, enabling self-contained skill packages.

providerExtensions.name: Auto-Invocation
providerExtensions.summary: The Droid automatically invokes matching skills based on the description field; gated by user-invocable and disable-model-invocation flags.

providerExtensions.name: Monorepo Skill Paths
providerExtensions.summary: Skills may live in per-project .factory/skills/ directories or a shared root-level .factory/skills/ for monorepo organization.

providerExtensions.name: Skill Composability
providerExtensions.summary: The Droid can chain multiple skills within a single plan, composing reusable primitives instead of building monolithic skills.

providerExtensions.name: Legacy Commands Compatibility
providerExtensions.summary: Files under .factory/commands/ are still loaded for backwards compatibility, though skills are now the preferred mechanism.
